mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_regulation WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_chemical_regulation WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_regulation WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_chemical_regulation ( reg_code, reg_name, reg_type, authority, applicable_count, last_revision_date, next_review_date, status, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{regCode}, #{regName}, #{regType}, #{authority}, #{applicableCount}, #{lastRevisionDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{nextReviewDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_chemical_regulation SET reg_code = #{regCode}, reg_name = #{regName}, reg_type = #{regType}, authority = #{authority}, applicable_count = #{applicableCount}, last_revision_date = #{lastRevisionDate,jdbcType=DATE}, next_review_date = #{nextReviewDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_chemical_regulation SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
